name: TEST - Supplier Mismatch Warning (CIB)
trigger_condition:
(
  not is_empty(field.sender_match)
  and not is_empty(field.sender_name_match)
  and not is_empty(field.sender_name_export)
  and field.sender_name_match != field.sender_name_export
)

payload.content: The supplier on the backing document PO/Contract is different from the supplier matched on the document.
The supplier on the backing document PO/Contract is different from the supplier matched on the document.
